title: Velvety Italian Papelon Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic vegetarian-friendly Italian dish featuring papelon vegetables and infused with the subtle flavors of tandoor spices for a rich, velvety texture.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and garlic, sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste, cook for an additional minute to reduce and intensify flavors.
Add papelon, bell peppers, and zucchini to the pan. Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
Sauté vegetables together until they start to soften and slightly brown, about 10 minutes.
Taste test and adjust seasoning if necessary, adding more tandoori spices or herbs like oregano for extra depth of flavor.
